name: options_coverage
description: Asserts the ~30 BeancountOptions keys Fava reads are present and correctly typed. Key list derived from fava/beans/types.py (fava 1.30.12). Excludes filename, include, input_hash (runtime-varying) and dcontext (non-serializable live object; see FAVA-001).
source:
option "title" "Options Coverage Test"
option "operating_currency" "USD"
option "operating_currency" "EUR"
option "name_assets" "Assets"
option "name_liabilities" "Liabilities"
option "name_equity" "Equity"
option "name_income" "Income"
option "name_expenses" "Expenses"
option "account_previous_balances" "Opening-Balances"
option "account_previous_earnings" "Earnings:Previous"
option "account_previous_conversions" "Conversions:Previous"
option "account_current_earnings" "Earnings:Current"
option "account_current_conversions" "Conversions:Current"
option "account_unrealized_gains" "Earnings:Unrealized"
option "account_rounding" "Equity:Rounding"
option "booking_method" "STRICT"
option "conversion_currency" "NOTHING"
option "infer_tolerance_from_cost" "TRUE"
option "render_commas" "TRUE"
option "plugin_processing_mode" "default"
option "tolerance_multiplier" "2.0"
option "inferred_tolerance_default" "USD:0.005"

2024-01-01 open Assets:Bank USD

known_divergences.beancount-parser: Parser-only adapter; no loader, options map is empty.
known_divergences.beancount-parser-lima: Parser-only adapter; no loader, options map is empty.
known_divergences.beancount-v2: beancount v2 omits booking_method, commodities, display_precision, inferred_tolerance_default, tolerance_multiplier, inferred_tolerance_multiplier, account_unrealized_gains, and pythonpath; v3-only options trigger parse errors.
